python MPS_simulation/dist/10qubits/partition_compare/run_partition_case.py --config /gpfs/home/tonshen/Seawulf_simulation/MPS_simulation/dist/10qubits/partition_compare/param.yaml --case partition_8x8 --out-dir /gpfs/home/tonshen/Seawulf_simulation/MPS_simulation/dist/10qubits/partition_compare/runs/20260319_partition_compare_no1x1_seed12_iter1000_r10/partition_8x8_seed=1 --iterations 1000 --report-every 10 --init-seed 1
